description: CompositionFresh blue t-shirt made of polyester and lycra mix with short sleeves and sweat protectionWash careHand wash or machine washMake working out an absolute pleasure in this short-sleeved tank top from adidas. Highly stylish with a cross curved V-neck and deep pocket cuts that accentuate the waistline, this polyester and lycra mix top helps you stay cool during workout sessions. Pair this with tights or skinny jeans and you're all set to take on the world.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts 2. Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
